title: Will Truist Spin Off its Large Insurance Unit?
text: Rumors are swirling that Truist is planning to either spin off its insurance arm or sell a portion of the unit.

title: Truist Is Finally Done With Merger Expenses. Now, the Bank Must Prove Its Worth.
text: Truist is the product of the merger between BB&T and SunTrust, the largest bank deal in more than a decade.

title: Truist Looks Better Placed Than Many Banks For Better Growth In 2023
text: Truist reported one of the better core banking results so far this quarter, with a 2% beat at the pre-provision profit line and good operating leverage. Truist is outperforming with its commercial lending, and a relatively healthier Southeast region should support the business, as should lower-than-average deposit beta.

title: Truist outlook draws questions and hiked estimates from analysts
text: Truist Financial Corp.'s financial projections for 2023 prompted one analyst to question whether they would be able to deliver and prompted others to increase their outlooks for the bank.

title: Why Truist Shares Are Trading Higher Today
text: Truist Financial TFC shares are trading higher after the company reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings results.

title: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE:TFC ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call January 19, 2023 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Ankur Vyas - Head, Investor Relations Bill Rogers - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Mike Maguire - Chief Financial Officer Clarke Starnes - Vice Chair and Chief Risk Officer Beau Cummins - Vice Chair John Howard - Chief Insurance Officer Conference Call Participants Mike Mayo - Wells Fargo Securities Ken Usdin - Jefferies Matt O'Connor - Deutsche Bank John McDonald - Autonomous Research Ebrahim Poonawala - Bank of America Gerard Cassidy - RBC Betsy Graseck - Morgan Stanley Operator Greetings, ladies and gentlemen and welcome to the Truist Financial Corporation's Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] As a reminder, this event is being recorded.

title: Truist Financial (TFC) Q4 Earnings Beat, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Truist Financial (TFC) records a rise in revenues and marginally higher expenses in the fourth quarter of 2022.

title: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.56% and 1.25%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Truist reports fourth quarter and full year 2022 results
text: Fourth quarter 2022 GAAP earnings of $1.6 billion, or $1.20 per diluted share   Fourth quarter 2022 Adjusted earnings of $1.7 billion, or $1.30 per diluted share   Results reflect strong PPNR performance as a result of strong loan growth and expanded NIM   Capital, liquidity, and credit quality remain strengths CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Jan. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today reported earnings for the fourth quarter and full year of 2022.

title: 10 Biggest Companies Reporting Earnings in the Third Week of Jan 2023
text: The fourth quarter earnings season officially started this week. Wall Street is expecting a rough quarter ahead, with Goldman Sachs and other banks preparing for layoffs.

title: Paul Tudor Jones Says ESG-Friendly Companies Will 'Be Rewarded'
text: As more corporations strive to prioritize environmental, social and governance factors over their balance sheets, hedge fund icon Paul Tudor Jones (Trades, Portfolio) told CNBC's “Squawk Box” on Tuesday it is clear if “you do what the vast majority of Americans want, your company is going to be rewarded in its stock performance.”

title: 5 S&P 500 Banks With Solid Dividend Yield Amid Recession Risk
text: Apart from strong fundamentals, the S&P 500 banks like Citi (C), Truist (TFC), U.S. Bancorp (USB), Huntington (HBAN) and Citizens Financial (CFG) have solid dividend yields, which will help income investors generate robust returns.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For January 2023
text: I present my top 10 High Yield dividend stocks that are poised to offer strong future returns. The annualized rate of return for this watchlist is 12.67% over the past 26 months.
